creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Jul  7 19:16:21 UTC 2019

URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/506193

Log:
  Add py-csscompressor 0.9.5

  Almost exact port of YUI CSS Compressor. Passes all original unittests.

  WWW: https://github.com/sprymix/csscompressor

  - While I'm here, change MASTER_SITES to CHEESESHOP

  PR:		239032
